name: evolution-sandbox
description: A data-driven playable sandbox based on the Evolution universe

scripts.check:content: node scripts/build-content.mjs --check && node scripts/check-civilization-content.mjs && node scripts/check-stellar-content.mjs
scripts.build:web: npm run build:web:basic && npm run build:web:babylon
scripts.test: npm run build:web && npm run test:web:babylon && node --test test/*.test.mjs scripts/*.test.mjs
scripts.check: npm run check:content && npm run check:protocol && npm test && npm run check:lua && npm run check:public
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run demo && npm run demo:civilization && npm run demo:civilization:control && npm run demo:stellar && npm run demo:interop && npm audit --audit-level=high
